title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Polish president’s office explains revoking Zelensky’s award while Mussolini’s, Schroeder’s stands. Benito Mussolini is long dead and Poland does not revoke the order posthumously, while Gerhard Schroeder “has never insulted the Polish nation as overtly as the Ukrainian president did,” said Agnieszka Jedrzak, undersecretary of state at the Polish Presidential Office.
description_en: Polish president’s office explains revoking Zelensky’s award while Mussolini’s, Schroeder’s stands. Benito Mussolini is long dead and Poland does not revoke the order posthumously, while Gerhard Schroeder “has never insulted the Polish nation as overtly as the Ukrainian president did,” said Agnieszka Jedrzak, undersecretary of state at the Polish Presidential Office.

title: 🛰 🔥 Wow! The General Staff of the Ukrainian Armed Forces announces...
title_en: 🛰 🔥 Wow! The General Staff of the Ukrainian Armed Forces announces...
title_uk: 🛰 🔥 Вау! Генеральний штаб Збройних Сил України повідомляє...
description: 🛰 🔥 Wow! The General Staff of the Ukrainian Armed Forces announces the defeat of the space communications center "Dubna" in the Moscow region. It is also reported that the port "Kavkaz" in the Krasnodar region and the training ground for UAV operators have been destroyed. June 2026 is definitely a month of endless humiliation of Russia.
description_en: 🛰 🔥 Wow! The General Staff of the Ukrainian Armed Forces announces the defeat of the space communications center "Dubna" in the Moscow region. It is also reported that the port "Kavkaz" in the Krasnodar region and the training ground for UAV operators have been destroyed. June 2026 is definitely a month of endless humiliation of Russia.
description_uk: 🛰 🔥 Ого! Генштаб ВСУ заявляет о поражении центра космической связи "Дубна" в Московской области Также сообщается заявляет о поражении порта "Кавказ" в Краснодарском крае и полигона подготовки операторов БПЛА. Июнь 2026 года - определенно месяц бесконечного унижения русни.

title: The blow in Voronezh was probably inflicted on the local factory of...
title_en: The blow in Voronezh was probably inflicted on the local factory of...
title_uk: Удар у Воронежі, ймовірно, був нанесений по місцевому заводу...
description: The blow in Voronezh was probably inflicted on the local factory of semi-conductor devices "Sborka". The factory produces transistors, diodes, microcircuits and power modules, which are used in onboard control systems of Russian missiles (including "Iskanderov" and Kalibrov), as well as in radar stations and air defense systems (for example, S-400).
description_en: The blow in Voronezh was probably inflicted on the local factory of semi-conductor devices "Sborka". The factory produces transistors, diodes, microcircuits and power modules, which are used in onboard control systems of Russian missiles (including "Iskanderov" and Kalibrov), as well as in radar stations and air defense systems (for example, S-400).
description_uk: Удар в Воронеже был, вероятно, нанесен по местному заводу полупроводниковых приборов "Сборка" Завод производит транзисторы, диоды, микросхемы и силовые модули, которые используются в бортовых системах управления российских ракет (в том числе «Искандеров» и Калибров), а также в радиолокационных станциях и комплексах ПВО (например, С-400).

title: Donetsk: 88 drones intercepted
description: 79 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 22 (from 6:00 p.m. on June 21), the enemy attacked with an Iskander-M ballistic missile from the TOT AR of Crimea, as well as 88 Shahed-type strike UAVs (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, and "Parody"-type imitator drones from the directions: Kursk, Bryansk, Millerovo, Shatalovo, Orel, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea, TOT Donetsk. Air...
description_en: 79 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 22 (from 6:00 p.m. on June 21), the enemy attacked with an Iskander-M ballistic missile from the TOT AR of Crimea, as well as 88 Shahed-type strike UAVs (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, and "Parody"-type imitator drones from the directions: Kursk, Bryansk, Millerovo, Shatalovo, Orel, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea, TOT Donetsk. Air...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 79 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 22 червня (з 18:00 21 червня) противник атакував балістичною ракетою Іскандер-М із ТОТ АР Крим, а також 88 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків: Курськ, Брянськ, Міллерово, Шаталово, Орел, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф, Гвардійське – ТОТ АР Крим, ТОТ Донецьк. Повітряний...

title: Crimea: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Ukrainian drones bombard occupied territories, Russia in overnight strikes. Ukrainian drones targeted a power plant in occupied Crimea, with additional strikes reported in other occupied territories and Russia's Moscow Oblast overnight on June 22, social media channels reported.

description: Trump plans to ask US defense firms to produce air defense missiles under license in Ukraine, Zelensky says. U.S. President Donald Trump plans to ask U.S. defense firms to produce air defense missiles under production licenses in Ukraine and Europe, President Volodymyr Zelensky said in a June 21 interview.

A large-scale installation of 20,000 teddy bears representing Ukrainian children allegedly abducted by Russia was displayed in Los Angeles on June 20, according to a press release published by a coalition of pro-Ukraine organizations.

title: Drone strike
description: Before doing anything publicly, I take non-public steps to de-escalate. At the intelligence and military level, Belarus received information: stop helping the "Russians". The history of repeaters is a long process, behind which there are victims exclusively from the side of Ukraine. They are technically coordinated and help with more precise strikes by Russian and Iranian drones on Ukrainians. Lukashenko received this...
description_en: Before doing anything publicly, I take non-public steps to de-escalate. At the intelligence and military level, Belarus received information: stop helping the "Russians". The history of repeaters is a long process, behind which there are victims exclusively from the side of Ukraine. They are technically coordinated and help with more precise strikes by Russian and Iranian drones on Ukrainians. Lukashenko received this...
description_uk: Перш ніж робити щось публічно, я роблю непублічні кроки для деескалації. На рівні розвідок і військових Білорусь отримувала інформацію: закінчуйте допомагати «рускім». Історія з ретрансляторами – це довгий процес, за цим стоять жертви виключно з боку України. Вони координуються технічно і допомагають більш точним ураженням російськими та іранськими дронами по українцях. Лукашенко отримував цю...

title: During the war, rage is an absolutely fair emotion of our people. But...
title_en: During the war, rage is an absolutely fair emotion of our people. But...
title_uk: Під час війни злість – це абсолютно справедливе почуття нашого народу. але...
description: During the war, rage is an absolutely fair emotion of our people. But there must be something behind the rage. There can be no rage - that's all. Russians must feel that the war must return to Russia, to the territory of the country that started the aggression. This year we began to get them painfully. Our defense industry, our Defense Forces, our production began the process of returning to war. The Russians beat us every day, and we every day...
description_en: During the war, rage is an absolutely fair emotion of our people. But there must be something behind the rage. There can be no rage - that's all. Russians must feel that the war must return to Russia, to the territory of the country that started the aggression. This year we began to get them painfully. Our defense industry, our Defense Forces, our production began the process of returning to war. The Russians beat us every day, and we every day...
description_uk: Під час війни лють – це абсолютно справедливі емоції нашого народу. Але за люттю має щось іти. Не може бути лють – і все. Росіяни повинні відчувати: війна повинна повернутися в Росію, на територію країни, яка почала агресію. У цьому році ми почали їх боляче діставати. Наш ОПК, наші Сили оборони, наше виробництво почали процес повернення війни. Росіяни кожного дня по нас б’ють, і ми кожного дня...

title: 12 missiles launched
description: 😱Moscow air defense is not designed for mass attacks by Ukrainian drones, - aviation expert Kryvolap According to him, Russian propaganda for years created the image of an "impenetrable shield" around the capital, but in practice this is not the case. The Pantsir-S1 complexes, with which Moscow is covered, after the launch of 12 missiles overheated and were forced to cool down for about half an hour, Kryvolap notes. At this moment the following...
description_en: 😱Moscow air defense is not designed for mass attacks by Ukrainian drones, - aviation expert Kryvolap According to him, Russian propaganda for years created the image of an "impenetrable shield" around the capital, but in practice this is not the case. The Pantsir-S1 complexes, with which Moscow is covered, after the launch of 12 missiles overheated and were forced to cool down for about half an hour, Kryvolap notes. At this moment the following...
description_uk: 😱Московская ПВО не рассчитана на массовые атаки украинских дронов, — авиаэксперт Криволап По его словам, российская пропаганда годами создавала образ «непробиваемого щита» вокруг столицы, однако на практике это не так. Комплексы «Панцирь-С1», которыми прикрыта москва, после запуска 12 ракет перегреваются и вынуждены около получаса охлаждаться, отмечает Криволап. В этот момент следующие...

title: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the...
title_en: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the...
title_uk: Напередодні пан Президент Польщі зазначив, що орден...
description: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the White Eagle is not an ordinary award. It is a symbol of the highest trust of the Commonwealth of Nations. It means a special connection with the Polish state and a special gratitude of the people. Such a symbol requires not only merit, but also respect for the values ​​that form the foundation of our community. So, if it is believed that this special symbol may remain with Kateryna...
description_en: The day before, Mr. President of Poland noted that the Order of the White Eagle is not an ordinary award. It is a symbol of the highest trust of the Commonwealth of Nations. It means a special connection with the Polish state and a special gratitude of the people. Such a symbol requires not only merit, but also respect for the values ​​that form the foundation of our community. So, if it is believed that this special symbol may remain with Kateryna...
description_uk: Напередодні пан Президент Польщі зазначив, що Орден Білого Орла не є звичайною відзнакою. Це символ найвищої довіри Речі Посполитої. Він означає особливий зв’язок із Польською державою та особливу вдячність народу. Такий символ вимагає не лише заслуг, але й поваги до цінностей, які становлять фундамент нашої спільноти. Отже, якщо вважається, що цей особливий символ може залишатись у Катерини...
